name: Mold & Air Quality Professionals
description: Full-service mold inspection, testing, and remediation firm established in 2002. Staff includes Forensic Environmental Specialists and Industrial Hygiene Consultants.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Greg was on time and gave us a thorough inspection, He took his time to go over the inspection
Excellent to work with and very informative.
The mold process was affordable and performed on time. Greg and his staff were very thorough.
We have recommended him to other neighbors.

sentiment.summary: Mold & Air Quality Professionals has an excellent reputation with consistently positive reviews praising professionalism, thoroughness, prompt service, and customer-friendly explanations.
